nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (ARNICA MONTANA/ARTEMISIA CAPILLARIS/CALENDULA OFFICINALIS/CYANUS SEGETUM /MATRICARIA CHAMOMILLA/HUMULUS LUPULUS/LAVANDULA ANGUSTIFOLIA/LONICERA JAPONICA/MALVA SYLVESTRIS/ROSA CENTIFOLIA/SAMBUCUS NIGRA/TILIA CORDATA/TUSSILAGO FARFARA) FLOWER EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: (Arnica Montana/Artemisia Capillaris/Calendula Officinalis/Cyanus Segetum /Matricaria Chamomilla/Humulus Lupulus/Lavandula Angustifolia/Lonicera Japonica/Malva Sylvestris/Rosa Centifolia/Sambucus Nigra/Tilia Cordata/Tussilago Farfara) Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of Arnica montana , Artemisia capillaris , Calendula officinalis , Cyanus segetum , Matricaria chamomilla , Humulus lupulus , Lavandula angustifolia , Lonicera japonica , Malva sylvestris , Rosa centifolia , Sambucus nigra , Tilia cordata and Tussilago farfara. The accepted scientific name for Cyanus segetum is Centaurea cyanus , and Rosa centifolia is Rosa x centifolia.
inciName: (ARNICA MONTANA/ARTEMISIA CAPILLARIS/CALENDULA OFFICINALIS/CYANUS SEGETUM /MATRICARIA CHAMOMILLA/HUMULUS LUPULUS/LAVANDULA ANGUSTIFOLIA/LONICERA JAPONICA/MALVA SYLVESTRIS/ROSA CENTIFOLIA/SAMBUCUS NIGRA/TILIA CORDATA/TUSSILAGO FARFARA) FLOWER EXTRACT
